# Azurewrath

> Azurewrath is a Roblox Limited item trading analytics platform. Track RAP (Recent Average Price), monitor sales, scan inventories, snipe deals, and manage trade ads for Roblox Limited and Limited Unique items.

## Features

- Real-time RAP and price tracking for Roblox Limited items
- Deals page showing items currently below RAP
- Player inventory scanning and RAP history graphs
- Snipe tool for spotting underpriced listings instantly via SSE stream
- Watchlist with Discord and browser push notifications for price/sale changes
- Trade ads system for posting and browsing trade offers
- Manipulation detection flagging suspicious RAP spikes
- Player leaderboard ranked by total RAP
- Sales feed showing recent RAP changes across all tracked items
- UAID (User Asset ID) lookup with hold period and serial tracking

## Pages

- https://azurewrath.lol/ — Homepage and platform overview
- https://azurewrath.lol/deals — Live deals sorted by discount below RAP
- https://azurewrath.lol/sales — Recent sales / RAP change feed
- https://azurewrath.lol/players — Player leaderboard by RAP
- https://azurewrath.lol/search — Search for tracked Roblox Limited items
- https://azurewrath.lol/snipe — Real-time snipe stream for underpriced items
- https://azurewrath.lol/watchlist — Your personal item watchlist
- https://azurewrath.lol/verify — Sign in with your Roblox account
- https://azurewrath.lol/trade — Browse and post trade ads
- https://azurewrath.lol/news — Platform news and updates

## Data Sources

Azurewrath pulls data exclusively from official Roblox APIs including the Economy, Inventory, Marketplace Sales, Catalog, and Thumbnails endpoints. No third-party price aggregators are used.
